title: Open Cloze: The Story of Coffee

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym slowem, tak aby powstal spojny i poprawny logicznie oraz gramatycznie tekst.
tasks.text:
Coffee is one of the most popular drinks in the world, but few people know 1.1. _________ it comes from. According to an old story, a goatherd in Ethiopia noticed that his goats became very lively after 1.2. _________ had eaten the bright red berries of a certain bush. He decided to try the berries 1.3. _________ , and soon he felt full of energy too.

The plant was later taken 1.4. _________ Arabia, where people learnt 1.5. _________ to roast the seeds, or beans, and boil them in water. By the sixteenth century, coffee was already being sold in busy cafes 1.6. _________ the Middle East. These places became 1.7. _________ popular that some of them were known as "schools of the wise".

When coffee finally reached Europe, it quickly became fashionable. London had hundreds of coffee houses 1.8. _________ merchants and writers gathered to talk and exchange news. Today coffee is grown in 1.9. _________ than seventy countries, and millions of cups 1.10. _________ drunk every single day.
